programme.title: The Goldbergs: This Is This Is Spinal Tap
programme.desc: The Dropouts are thrilled when they book a gig at a Flyers charity carnival, and Adam uses the opportunity to make his very first rockumentary. Since Barry doesn't want to miss out on the fun, he forces his way into the band.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And the Escape Room
programme.desc: Han insists the diner gang attends a mandatory night out in an 'Escape Room Club' when he feels they aren't working together as a team. However, once they're locked inside the 'Alice in Wonderland'-themed room, they find Han has an ulterior motive.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: The Game: Getting to Know All a Butt You
programme.desc: In an attempt to expand his empire beyond football, Malik seeks out an investor for his new business venture. Meanwhile, after having brunch with Brittany, Jason and Chardonnay begin to question how well they really know one another.

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Papa Bear
programme.desc: Mike arrives at work to discover Kyle feeding stray cats off the warehouse's loading dock. Meanwhile, Kristin has been working so hard preparing to host her very first brunch at the Outdoor Man Grill that Ryan is feeling neglected.

programme.title: Funny You Should Ask
programme.desc: Guest stars include Jon Lovitz, Jackeé Harry, Louie Anderson, Byron Allen, Whitney Cummings, and Jamie Kennedy.

programme.title: Couples Court With the Cutlers: Havard vs. Hopkins
programme.desc: A woman’s distrust of her boyfriend’s suspicious behaviour has strained their relationship to the breaking point.

programme.title: America's Court With Judge Ross: Burn Baby, Burn/ Crummy Clown
programme.desc: A kitchen fire leads to a ruined reputation.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Hoarding Roommate/ 4th and Goal
programme.desc: Roommates dispute over a laptop that was thrown away/ a man loses out on a job and blames his barber.

programme.title: Right This Minute
programme.desc: Stay up-to-date with the most viral videos online.

programme.title: Daily Mail TV
programme.desc: Your number one source for celebrity news, gossip and photos.

programme.title: Lauren Lake's Paternity Court: Swinton vs. Walker
programme.desc: A woman claims her son foolishly signed the birth certificate knowing he did not father his ex-girlfriend’s child.

programme.title: The Verdict With Judge Hatchett: Home on the Gun Range/ Virtual Reality Bites
programme.desc: Neighbor's gun range causes distress to woman's dog; broken VR headset.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: Strippers Milkin' It
programme.desc: Joe says his relationship has a 90-day expiration date. The woman he’s been dating, Jamie, has exceeded her 90-day term, and he says it’s time for her to go!

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: The Plaintiff and his wife have petitioned the court for a DNA test to determine if he is the father of the Defendant's child.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: Cases include: dissing a designer, pooling around and running out.

programme.title: The People's Court
programme.desc: The presiding judge serves as an arbitrator in these real-life small-claims court cases.

programme.title: Justice With Judge Mablean: Punk'd/ Extreme Advocate
programme.desc: Dispute over prize winnings; plaintiff sues over broken window display.

programme.title: Judge Jerry
programme.desc: A daughter refuses to pay her mother back on a cash loan or return an iPhone saying she doesn't owe her a penny. Then, the plaintiff says her ex is a deadbeat who took her collection of luxury purses and never paid her back the money he borrowed.

programme.title: The Steve Wilkos Show: Were My Daughters Starved, Burned and Molested?
programme.desc: Brianna and her ex-boyfriend Ryan are in a custody battle with damning accusations. Brianna is accused of neglecting their daughters, allowing someone to burn them and leaving them in the care of a molester.

programme.title: Maury: We Had a 30 Second One-Night-Stand ... That's Not My Baby
programme.desc: Hope is here to prove J.R. is the father of her two-month-old son. While the two agreed to sleeping with each other, their stories differ after that point.

programme.title: The Jerry Springer Show: BBW Blizzard
programme.desc: Leanna believes her boyfriend, Oreo, and another woman hooked up during a recent snowstorm and wants him to come clean. Then, Tara demands to know the truth so she can try to save her marriage after catching her husband sending messages to another woman.

programme.title: Movie: Mrs. Doubtfire
programme.desc: When his wife wins custody of their children, an actor poses as a female housekeeper in order to spend time with them.

programme.title: Movie: The Station Agent
programme.desc: A man who was born with dwarfism finds his solitude interrupted by a vendor and a woman.

programme.title: Movie: College
programme.desc: During an orientation visit at Fieldmont University, best friends Kevin, Carter and Morris fall in with one of the rowdiest fraternities on campus. As new recruits, they are subjected to endless humiliations and to the no-holds-barred college party scene.

programme.title: Movie: Ever After: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A strong-willed girl catches the eye of a charming prince and finds true love.

programme.title: Movie: Bringing Down the House
programme.desc: A lonely man meets a woman on the Internet who happens to be in prison. When she breaks out to be with him, she proceeds to wreak havoc on his middle-class life.

programme.title: Movie: Notting Hill
programme.desc: The press tests the relationship between a Hollywood star and a London shopkeeper.

programme.title: Movie: A Thousand Words
programme.desc: After an encounter with a spiritual guru, a literary agent finds an odd tree in his yard that loses a leaf each time the agent speaks.

programme.title: Movie: Rocket Science
programme.desc: A high school student joins the debate team in hopes that it will cure his stuttering.

programme.title: Movie: Everybody Wants to Be Italian
programme.desc: A man and a woman pretend to be Italian to win each other's affection.

programme.title: Movie: Grandma's Boy
programme.desc: A 35-year-old man named Alex is forced to live with his grandmother after getting thrown out of his former place due to non-payment of rent.

programme.title: Movie: Just Like Heaven
programme.desc: When a workaholic doctor is seriously injured in a horrible car accident, her spirit is left lingering somewhere between Heaven and Earth in her old apartment, where a lonely architect is now living.

programme.title: Movie: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Rodrick Rules
programme.desc: After summer vacation, two brothers must deal with their parents' attempts for them to bond.

programme.title: Movie: Down to You
programme.desc: A man finds the girl of his dreams only to discover that she is not ready for commitment.

programme.title: Movie: Gulliver's Travels
programme.desc: A travel writer becomes shipwrecked on an island where he is much taller than the tiny citizens that inhabit it.

programme.title: Gary Gulman: The Great Depresh
programme.desc: In his first HBO comedy special, Gary Gulman offers candid reflections on his struggles with depression through stand-up and short documentary interludes that provide insight into his mental health journey.
